headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Charter Communications, Lowers Price Target to $160
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Jonathan Atkin   maintains Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $220 to $160.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Charter Communications, Lowers Price Target to $200
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Sebastiano Petti   maintains Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $215 to $200.
